doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_get_emax_max (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L94-L98). Two-line C body: `return MPFR_EMAX_MAX`. Returns the largest legal value the active emax (maximum exponent) may take.

MPFR_EMAX_MAX = MPFR_EXP_INVALID - 1 = +(2^62 - 1) = 4611686018427387903 on 64-bit systems. The TS port hardcodes this constant.

Tag minimums per Rule 7 inapplicable; single happy case (carve-out).
divergence_from_c: C returns mpfr_exp_t; TS returns bigint. Value hardcoded to +4611686018427387903 per probed system libmpfr.
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L94-L98 -- the C reference body.
